---
title: "Journal of the Lady Beatrix Graham - with a preface by Charlotte Mary Yonge (1871)"
year: 1871
slug: "journal_of_the_Lady_Beatrix_Graham"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


**Journal of the Lady Beatrix Graham**

by J. M. F. Smith (= Mrs. Fowler Smith, afterwards Smith-Dampier)  
has a preface by Charlotte Mary Yonge

Person(s) as subject:

Montrose, James Graham,. Marquis of,. 1612-1650.  
Maderty, Beatrice Graham Drummond,. Baroness,. 1615-1691  
Period of Montrose and the Covenant

Peerage of Carmichael

This ancient surname is local, and was assumed by the propiertors of the lands and barony of Carmichael, in the shire of Lanark, which has been long in the possession, and still is one of the chief seats of this noble family.

More information at the following website:[http://www.millenicom.com/~mattc/research%20site/03-historic/peerage.htm](http://www.millenicom.com/%7Emattc/research%20site/03-historic/peerage.htm)
